are_you_ok.title: Localized flooding in several areas of Marshall County amid flash flood warning, driver rescued from car
are_you_ok.summary: Flash flood warning and localized flooding in Marshall County with a water rescue; acute event affecting the metro area. Check-in warranted.
are_you_ok.description: MARSHALL COUNTY, W.Va. (WTRF) - Severe weather prompted a flash flood warning across the Ohio Valley Tuesday, including Marshall County, W.Va.   The national weather service extended that warning until 8:00 p.m. Tuesday.   Around 3:00 p.m., Marshall County’s EMA Director Tom Hart informed 7News about localized flooding on 21st Street in McMechen.   The road was closed down due to [...]
